title: Radiographer (MRI) - 5.5 day Office Hours
description:
We are seeking an experienced Radiographer with strong foundations in general radiography to join a specialist healthcare setting. This role offers hands-on clinical work combined with leadership exposure, training responsibilities, and quality improvement initiatives.

Key Responsibilities

  • Perform general radiography and advanced imaging (MRI) with high clinical accuracy

  • Ensure optimal operation, safety, and maintenance of imaging equipment

  • Uphold strict radiation safety, infection control, and workplace safety standards

  • Deliver professional, prompt, and patient-centred service

  • Handle patient enquiries and complaints with confidence and empathy

  • Maintain efficient patient turnaround times

  • Plan, organise, and prioritise daily workloads effectively

  • Train, coach, and mentor junior radiographers

  • Motivate and support team members to achieve performance standards

  • Participate in quality assurance and continuous improvement initiatives

Additional Duties

  • Oversee daily operations of the assigned imaging section

  • Compile and analyse departmental statistics

  • Ensure the work environment meets organisational and professional standards

  • Support ad-hoc duties as assigned by the reporting officer

Key Skills & Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Radiography or equivalent

  • Registered with relevant professional body (where applicable)

  • Strong experience in General Radiography

  • Hands-on exposure to CT and/or MRI

  • Solid understanding of radiation safety and infection control

  • Ability to manage patients professionally, including challenging situations

  • Team-oriented with leadership and coaching capability

Why This Role

  • Competitive salary package

  • Exposure to advanced imaging modalities

  • Leadership and training opportunities

  • Stable, permanent role within a specialist healthcare environment



    Send your detailed CV (Word format) to enoch.cheong@peopleprofilers.com today!
